title: First Discoveries Made
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM SellOrganicData WHERE Bonus > 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Species_Localised, Species) AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Bonus), 0) AS value FROM SellOrganicData WHERE Bonus > 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} first-discovery biological sample(s) registered during the report period. These are species that no commander had previously catalogued — among the rarest achievements in exploration. The bonus column reflects Universal Cartographics' appreciation for the exclusivity.
details.help: SellOrganicData with Bonus > 0 means Universal Cartographics paid a first-discovery premium. total is the headline count of unique first-discovery species.

tagLines: First-discovery biological entries confirmed. Universal Cartographics has flagged these species as new to the database.
No one had found these before you. Now they have a name, a classification, and a record.
The galaxy is older than language. You still found something it hadn't named yet.
